Why Work With Us

Global Mobility

Work from Vancouver, Dubai, or remotely. We handle visa and relocation.

Comprehensive Benefits

Health insurance, equity options, and generous learning budgets.

Cutting-Edge Tech

Work with the latest technologies: AI, cloud platforms, and modern frameworks.

Career Growth

Clear career paths, mentorship programs, and opportunities to lead.

Open Positions

We're hiring in Vancouver and Dubai. Find your perfect role below.

Senior Software Developer

EngineeringVancouver, CanadaFull-time
$120k - $180k CAD
Annual

Build cutting-edge AI-powered applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js. Work on enterprise solutions for Fortune 500 clients.

Requirements

  • 5+ years of software development experience
  • Expert in React, TypeScript, and Node.js
  • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)
  • Strong problem-solving and communication skills

Benefits

Equity optionsHealth insuranceRemote workLearning budget

$80k - $150k CAD + Commission
Annual

  • Proven track record of exceeding quotas
  • Experience selling technology solutions
